## Summary

<!-- What does this PR change and why? -->

## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] Docs / chore
- [ ] Dependency update

## Checklist

- [ ] `pnpm check` passes locally (format, lint, typecheck, unit tests)
- [ ] `pnpm build` succeeds
- [ ] New behaviour is covered by tests (unit and/or e2e)
- [ ] Updated docs / README if user-facing behaviour changed
